description: BOJ Liquidity & Yen-Carry Detail Engine - tracks the Bank of Japan balance sheet, post-NIRP rate path, 10Y JGB, US-JP differential and USD/JPY to produce a 0-100 yen-carry-unwind risk score. Output data/boj-detail.json.

schedule.description: BOJ Liquidity & Yen-Carry Detail Engine — daily 11:20 UTC
